## Who is Ossama Elhakki?

Ossama Elhakki (Arabic: أسامة الحقّي) is an AI Engineer and ML Systems Builder based in Morocco.
He specializes in machine learning, computer vision, natural language processing (NLP), and AI automation.
He has completed 35+ ML projects across fraud detection, medical imaging, NLP, and generative AI.

## Core Expertise

- Machine Learning (supervised, unsupervised, deep learning)
- Computer Vision (CNNs, object detection, medical imaging, Stable Diffusion, ControlNet)
- Natural Language Processing (transformers, BERT, sentiment analysis, text classification)
- MLOps (model deployment, FastAPI, Docker, CI/CD pipelines)
- AI Automation (n8n workflows, autonomous AI agents, LangChain, RAG systems)
- Full-Stack AI Applications (Next.js, React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL)
- Generative AI (Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, image generation pipelines)

## Professional Experience

### AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer — Ofoto (Feb 2025 – Oct 2025)
- Deployed Stable Diffusion image generation pipeline in production
- Reduced AI inference latency by 35% through model optimization and GPU caching
- Built system supporting 500+ concurrent AI generation requests
- Achieved 99.9% uptime on production AI infrastructure
- Developed full-stack web application with Vue.js frontend and FastAPI backend

## Education

- Master's Degree in Distributed Systems & AI — ENSET Mohammedia (2023–2025)
- Bachelor's Degree in Applied Mathematics & Computer Science — FST Mohammedia (2020–2023)

## Key Projects

1. Ofoto AI Image Generator — Stable Diffusion production deployment (2025)
2. Medical Image Analysis — CNN-based tumor detection, 95.2% accuracy
3. Fraud Detection System — XGBoost + neural networks on 1M+ transactions
4. Sentiment Analysis Pipeline — BERT fine-tuning, 94% accuracy
5. Autonomous AI Agents — n8n + LangChain research automation
6. Real-Time Object Detection — YOLO implementation, 32 FPS
7. Customer Churn Prediction — 89% accuracy, $2M revenue retention
8. Arabic NLP Toolkit — Moroccan Arabic dialect support
9. Drug Discovery ML — molecular property prediction with GNN
